name: defense-ai-incident-card-profile
description: DefenseTech Incident Card profile: publishable AI incident records for DIB contractors covering DFARS 72-hour cyber incidents, CUI spillage, ITAR/EAR export-control violations, foreign-person access breaches, CMMC POA&M open-finding-related failures, classified-environment AI misuse, NISPOM insider-threat events. 22-event-type enum, the largest Incident Card profile in the Suite.
